---
name: obligatory_ai-generated-comment
description: >
  Enforces the rule that every newly created file and every newly created class must include the exact comment
  "generated by AI in Github cloud" near the top of the file and directly above each class definition.
  Always apply this skill whenever creating new source files or new class definitions in any programming language
  during migration, code generation, or any other code-writing task. Never skip this comment even if the user
  does not explicitly ask for it — it is a mandatory auditability annotation.
---

# Skill: AI-Generated Comment Annotation

**Enforcement level:** Obligatory — apply to every new file and every new class without exception.

## Rule

Whenever a new file is created OR a new class is defined, include the following comment exactly as written:

```
generated by AI in Github cloud
```

The text must be **exact** — no variations, no punctuation changes, no capitalisation differences.

## Placement Rules

### New Files
- Add the comment at the **very top of the file**, before any imports, package declarations, or code.
- Place it as the **first line** (or immediately after a shebang line `#!/...` if one is required).

### New Classes
- Add the comment **directly above** each class definition (on the line immediately preceding the `class`
  keyword or equivalent).

## Language-Specific Comment Syntax

Use the appropriate single-line or block comment syntax for the target language:

| Language              | Comment style | Example                                      |
|-----------------------|---------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Python                | `#`           | `# generated by AI in Github cloud`          |
| Java                  | `//`          | `// generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| JavaScript/TypeScript | `//`          | `// generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| Kotlin                | `//`          | `// generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| C / C++ / C#          | `//`          | `// generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| Go                    | `//`          | `// generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| Ruby                  | `#`           | `# generated by AI in Github cloud`          |
| Swift                 | `//`          | `// generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| PHP                   | `//`          | `// generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| Rust                  | `//`          | `// generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| Markdown / YAML / TOML| `#`           | `# generated by AI in Github cloud`          |
| HTML / XML            | `<!-- -->`    | `<!-- generated by AI in Github cloud -->`   |
| SQL                   | `--`          | `-- generated by AI in Github cloud`         |
| Shell / Bash          | `#`           | `# generated by AI in Github cloud`          |

If the target language is not listed, use the language's standard single-line comment delimiter.

## Examples

### Python — new file with a class

```python
# generated by AI in Github cloud

from dataclasses import dataclass

# generated by AI in Github cloud
@dataclass
class UserProfile:
    user_id: int
    username: str
```

### Java — new file with a class

```java
// generated by AI in Github cloud

package com.example.service;

// generated by AI in Github cloud
public class OrderService {
    // ...
}
```

### TypeScript — new file with a class

```typescript
// generated by AI in Github cloud

import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';

// generated by AI in Github cloud
@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class AuthService {
    // ...
}
```

## What Counts as "New"

- Any file that is **created** during this session (not an existing file being modified).
- Any class that is **added** to a file in this session — whether in a newly created file or appended
  to an existing file.
- **Modifying** an existing class does NOT require adding the comment retroactively.

## Checklist Before Finalising Any Output

Before delivering any newly created file, verify:
- [ ] File-level comment `generated by AI in Github cloud` is present at the top.
- [ ] Each class definition is preceded by `generated by AI in Github cloud`.
- [ ] The comment text is character-for-character exact.
- [ ] The correct comment syntax for the target language is used.
